ChatGPT is an AI chatbot developed by OpenAI and released in November 2022.
ChatGPT uses the GPT-4 architecture as its underlying language model.
OpenAI offers both free and paid versions of ChatGPT to users worldwide.
ChatGPT can generate text and answer questions and assist with various tasks.
The free version of ChatGPT uses GPT 3.5 while the paid version uses GPT 4.
ChatGPT has over 100 million users as of early 2023 according to reports.
ChatGPT is available on web browsers and also has a mobile application.
OpenAI was founded by Elon Musk and Sam Altman among others before Musk left.
ChatGPT processes natural language inputs and generates human-like text responses.
The training data for ChatGPT has a knowledge cutoff which limits recent information.
ChatGPT can write code in multiple programming languages including Python and Java.
OpenAI released ChatGPT as a research preview initially before making it public.
ChatGPT uses reinforcement learning from human feedback to improve its responses.
Many companies are integrating ChatGPT APIs into their products and services.
ChatGPT is one of the fastest growing consumer applications in internet history.
Users can access ChatGPT at chat.openai.com by creating a free account.
ChatGPT Plus subscription costs around 20 dollars per month for premium access.
ChatGPT can remember context within a conversation but not between sessions by default.
Schools and universities are debating policies around ChatGPT use in academics.
